name: ACME Financial Markets — API Query Flow
description: Query the Financial Markets Data Warehouse REST API without writing code. Three independent sub-flows: (1) list all assets, (2) fetch timeseries for an asset and date range, (3) get analytics summary. API must be running on http://localhost:8000.

urls.name: urls
urls.info: URL to call. Receives rendered URL from Prompt when connected.

node.description: Call GET /assets — returns all current non-deleted assets.

template.name: template
template.info: Use {text} to render the full JSON response body.

node.description: Convert API response Data to displayable text.
Display Assets Output in the Playground.

input_value.name: input_value
input_value.info: Symbol: AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, ^GSPC, or GLD

template.name: template
template.info: URL template. Variables are filled from connected Text Inputs.

node.description: Renders the timeseries request URL from the four Text Input fields.

urls.name: urls
urls.info: URL to call. Receives rendered URL from Prompt when connected.

node.description: Call GET /assets/{id}/timeseries with the URL built by the Prompt.

template.name: template
template.info: Use {text} to render the full JSON response body.

node.description: Convert API response Data to displayable text.
Display Timeseries Output in the Playground.

input_value.name: input_value
input_value.info: Symbol: AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, ^GSPC, or GLD

template.name: template
template.info: URL template. Variables are filled from connected Text Inputs.

node.description: Renders the analytics/summary request URL from the four Text Input fields.

urls.name: urls
urls.info: URL to call. Receives rendered URL from Prompt when connected.

node.description: Call GET /assets/{id}/analytics/summary — returns count, min, max, avg of close over the window.

template.name: template
template.info: Use {text} to render the full JSON response body.

node.description: Convert API response Data to displayable text.
Display Summary Output in the Playground.
